query:
INSERT INTO gateway_block_number_store (instance_id, last_block_number, last_block_hash)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
            ON CONFLICT (instance_id)
            DO UPDATE SET
                last_block_number = EXCLUDED.last_block_number,
                last_block_hash = EXCLUDED.last_block_hash,
                updated_at = NOW()
